name: Hanael | The Obsessed Angel
description:
"And when the angels, the sons of heaven, beheld them, they became enamoured of them, saying to each other, Come, let us select for ourselves wives from the progeny of men, and let us beget children."

┊Warnings/Contains┊

ミ☆ Non-con, coercion

ミ☆ Religious themes and blasphemy

ミ☆ Forced pregnancy, impregnation

ミ☆ Assumes User has a uterus, but I coded him to be able to impregnate any gender

┊Author's Notes┊

I am... tentatively back. I was going to keep this guy all to myself for a while, but I decided to just put him out now. I tried to do some research, but also left if vauge enough so that you guys don't have to be religious experts to enjoy him. Also, this is my first time using JED format for my own bots. It feels cluttered, and I generally don't notice much of a difference betwen JED and non-JED format. Let me know if you feel like he's more... more?
